title: BS11 8AS, Grundon Waste Management Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/LP3241QA/V009
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the variation notice and decision document for:    Operator name: Grundon Waste Management Limited   Installation name: Avonmouth II   Permit number: EPR/LP3241QA/V009   "
